  • Von net.sf.jailer.configuration verwendete Klassen in net.sf.jailer.configuration
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    Configuration
    Reads and holds configuration file jailer.json.
    Configuration.UrlRewriteRule
    URL rewrite rule.
    DatabaseObjectRenderingDescription
    Describes how generic database objects are rendered (Functions, Procedures etc).
    DBMS
    Describes a specific DBMS.
    LimitTransactionSizeInfo
    Holds information about how to do incremental inserts.
    LocalDatabaseConfiguration
    Configuration of the local database.
